visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two main characters, a male in a vibrant multi-colored jacket and a female in a red hoodie and beanie, stand in a bright mall corridor in front of a yellow "Photo Booth" decorated with stars and a cartoon character. The lighting is even and typical of an indoor shopping center, with polished floors reflecting the overhead lights. (2) Close-up shots feature various limited-edition merchandise including acrylic keychains hanging on a wire rack, plush dolls of a girl character in a pink dress, and colorful product boxes arranged neatly on wooden shelves. The camera pans across the items to show variety and detail. (3) The characters enter the photo booth and interact with a glowing touch screen displaying photo layouts. They then hold up a small, transparent CD-shaped keychain containing their printed photos, showing it close to the camera for detail, highlighting the product's small and intricate design. (4) The male character demonstrates a technological feature by tapping his smartphone against a CD keychain. The screen of the phone instantly loads a YouTube video interface, highlighting the integration of NFC technology with the merchandise in a brightly lit indoor space. (5) The duo presents a variety of goods: a phone case with 3D stickers, two types of canned beverages with colorful labels (yellow and pink), and large colorful folders. The camera uses quick cuts to transition between these items, maintaining a high visual density. (6) The characters stand before a counter, picking up commemorative gold coins to show the intricate 2D character printing and the shiny "10th Anniversary" logo on the back. They smile and gesture towards the camera as large yellow and blue text overlays appear. (7) A final promotional screen appears with the characters waving in a wide shot. A separate segment follows where the male creator holds a pink charm and humorously waves it in front of large character statues for a blessing.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 我們二伯在台中麗寶的十週年展. (2) [Subtitle]: 有些限定的週邊. (3) [Subtitle]: 馬上帶大家來開箱. (4) [Subtitle]: 十週年拍貼機. (5) [Subtitle]: 韓星規格. (6) [Subtitle]: 還可以掃QRcode. (7) [Subtitle]: 還有影片. (8) [Subtitle]: 還有CD吊飾. (9) [Variety]: 超可愛!!!. (10) [Subtitle]: 當CD的封面. (11) [Subtitle]: 還有還有!!!. (12) [Slogan]: NFC感應CD吊飾. (13) [Subtitle]: 直接幫我導流量. (14) [Subtitle]: 全新風格喔. (15) [Subtitle]: 最特別的是這個酒. (16) [Subtitle]: 有兩個口味. (17) [Variety]: 仙女七. (18) [Variety]: 香柚七. (19) [Variety]: 只要599!!. [Variety]: (超級便宜). (20) [Subtitle]: 資料夾也都有. (21) [Subtitle]: 十週年傘. (22) [Subtitle]: 二伯十週年的限定金幣. (23) [Variety]: 彩色印刷. (24) [Variety]: 超有質感. (25) [Slogan]: 即日起至1/11. [Slogan]: 免費入場. [Slogan]: 臺中麗寶Outlet二期1樓. (26) [Slogan]: 千億御守購前說明. (27) [Subtitle]: 這樣就有保佑囉.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 main female creator, several shoppers and staff visible in the background of the mall environment.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Male: Brown hair, wearing a white t-shirt under a blue, yellow, and green patterned jacket, grey sweatpants. Female: Black beanie with bear ears, red oversized hoodie, dark shorts, yellow sneakers.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The setting is a brightly lit, modern shopping mall (Lihpao Outlet) with polished tiled floors, white ceilings, and glass-fronted shops. Temporary exhibition booths, signage, and merchandise shelves are set up in the public walkway.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks with high energy and clarity, introducing the exhibition location. An upbeat, synthesized pop BGM with a steady 4/4 beat starts immediately, creating a cheerful, commercial atmosphere. The recording quality is professional with minimal background noise. (2) A sharp transition whoosh SFX triggers a shift as the speakers react to merchandise. The female voice enters with high-pitched, excited tones. Short "pop" and "ding" sound effects are synchronized with the visual appearance of each new product on screen. (3) The BGM ducks slightly as the male explains the NFC functionality in a narrative, instructional tone. His speech rate is moderate, and articulation is very clear. The ambient floor remains a quiet indoor room tone throughout the technical explanation. (4) A cartoonish comedy SFX accompanies a playful reaction from the characters. The music swells back to full volume, maintaining its bright, major-mode tonality. The two voices overlap occasionally in a friendly, conversational manner, expressing authentic excitement about the designs. (5) The audio concludes with a energetic dual invitation to visit the exhibition, featuring both voices at a high arousal level. A final musical stinger with a bright synthesizer chord marks the end of the main showcase. (6) A short, humorous segment follows with incidental rustling sounds and the male voice speaking in a lower, comedic register while performing a mock blessing with the charm.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Showcase of various items -> Event details -> Bonus segment.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional unboxing and tour of the 'hahababy' 10th-anniversary exhibition in Taichung. It highlights limited-edition merchandise, interactive photo booths, and unique technological features to drive attendance and sales for the brand.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators are actively showing and describing products from their own brand (hahababy) and inviting viewers to a specific exhibition event.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A fast-paced, high-energy promotional vlog that effectively uses variety-show editing and playful sound design to showcase brand merchandise.
